faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Zampa.
faq.a1: Yes, it is completely free for customers. Restaurants have a free plan with all basic features and a Pro Plan with push notifications and advanced statistics.
faq.q2: Which cities is it available in?
faq.a2: Zampa is available throughout Spain. Restaurants and bars in any city can sign up and publish their offers.
faq.q3: How do I publish my daily menu?
faq.a3: Sign up as a restaurant, complete your profile (address and phone number), and you can publish your first offer with a photo, price, and description.
faq.q4: What does the Pro Plan include?
faq.a4: Automatic push notifications to your followers every time you publish an offer, plus detailed impression and click statistics.
faq.q5: Do I need to make reservations through the app?
faq.a5: No. Zampa connects you with the restaurant so you can call directly or check how to get there. No middlemen.
faq.q6: Can I filter by dietary preferences?
faq.a6: Yes. You can filter offers by vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, lactose-free, nut-free, meat-free, and fish-free.
faq.a7: Write to us at soporte@getzampa.com and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
